2353410.name: HEX PLAT
2353410.description:
About This Game

The Game Is A Simple 2.5d Platform Action Game. The player can move and jump. That and solve puzzles using little gimmicks in the stages.
Some of the stages are a bit meaner than others, but you'll get through them.

How to Play

The only controls in the game are A, D and Space on the keyboard; the UI controls use the mouse, but the basic parts of the game can be played with one hand.

The objective of each stage is simple: manipulate the spheres to reach the red glowing tiles, that's it.
2353410.supported_languages: 英语, 简体中文, 繁体中文, 日语
